excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Advanced Photonic Technology and Materials lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/11045-mft-mpt Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: Entry scholarships of HK$10,000 will be awarded to applicants with excellent academic achievement. There is no need for the students to apply for the scholarship. The Department will identify qualified students and inform the selected students of the scholarship offers.
